location.office_time_required: up to one day per week from home (predominantly in-office)

level_signals: 8+ years of relevant work experience required
Base salary range up to $209K–$261K depending on location

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree or the equivalent combination of education and relevant experience AND
Demonstrated success leading complex, cross-functional strategic initiatives from concept through implementation

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in Wealth Management, including marketing, go-to-market strategy, sales or management consulting
Proven ability to collaborate effectively across functions such as market research, marketing, sales, advisory, and client experience
Experience developing and executing data-driven client engagement and conversion strategies

explicitly_excluded: FINRA licenses are not required and will not be supported for this role.

scope.surface: Advice & Client Product Marketing team; Individual Investors (II) Advice Strategy
scope.business_model: B2C / B2B asset management and financial advice services
primary_metrics_inferred: Offer suite health and adoption trends
core_responsibilities: Own advice offer development, synthesizing market, client, and performance insights into clear recommendations; develops robust business cases for high-conviction offer components.
Support go-to-market strategy execution for advice offers by partnering with segment marketers, sales, client experience teams to ensure differentiated positioning.

Conduct and interpret wealth management market and competitive assessments, developing insights and recommendations around growth opportunities, pricing strategies, and overall competitive positioning.
Monitor the health of the advice offer suite, identifying enhancement opportunities based on adoption trends, and evolving market dynamics.

Define business requirements for strategic growth capabilities, collaborating with cross-functional partners to prioritize, design, and implement new capabilities that support long-term growth objectives.

Design, test, and refine client engagement strategies that increase conversion into advice offers; partners with key stakeholders (segment marketers, data analytics) to assess and continuously improve outcomes.

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed across multiple geographies
Annual bonus eligibility mentioned in addition to base salary
Clear role scope tied to a defined strategy (Individual Investors Advice Strategy)
FINRA license requirements explicitly waived — lowers barrier to entry
Generous benefits package described including retirement plan and wellness
Posting expected to remain available until 08/30/2026 — not urgently expiring

Manages people status unclear — title is 'Senior Manager' but no direct reports mentioned
